mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM products
AND category_id = #{query.categoryId}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = 'active'
ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{query.size} OFFSET #{query.size} * (#{query.page} - 1)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products
AND category_id = #{query.categoryId}
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND status = 'active'
